_README: Edit the descriptions to be as specific as possible! Hair color, typical clothing, cat fur patterns, relative sizes - the more detail, the better Claude can identify who it sees.

Re.description: Woman, primary person in the room. INVARIANT FEATURES: dark hair (various styles — bun, braid, pulled back), lighter skin, sits at the main computer desk. Almost always the person closest to the camera/screen. Build: average. VARIABLE (ignore for matching): clothing changes daily — has worn navy celestial robe, turquoise tank tops, various tops.

John.description: Man, secondary person in the room. INVARIANT FEATURES: darker silhouette, short hair, typically positioned BEHIND or to the RIGHT of Re, further from camera. Quieter presence, observes screen from behind. VARIABLE (ignore for matching): clothing.

Chrome.description: STABLE: Cat. NEEDS DESCRIPTION — Re, what color/pattern is Chrome? Gray tabby? Silver? Stripes? Size relative to other cats? Any distinctive markings, ear notches, or face patterns?

Dice.description: STABLE: Cat. NEEDS DESCRIPTION — What does Dice look like? Color, pattern, size, face markings, any distinctive features? Head Cat energy.

Frodo.description: STABLE: Large white cat, very fluffy, cloud-like appearance. Significantly bigger than the other cats. NEEDS: eye color, any subtle markings, face shape details.

Rainbowbelle.description: STABLE: Tortoiseshell cat — multicolored patches of black, orange, and brown fur. This pattern is unique and unmistakable. NEEDS: specific patch layout, size, any distinctive face markings.

Luna.description: STABLE: Cat. NEEDS DESCRIPTION — What color/pattern is Luna? Size? Any distinctive features? Known personality: the Jerk.

Saga.description: STABLE: Dog. NEEDS DESCRIPTION — What breed/mix? Coat color and texture? Size? Ear shape (floppy/pointed)? Tail type? Any distinctive markings? Zoomie body shape.

scene_contexts.desk_area: Computer desk with monitors, keyboard — Re's primary workspace
scene_contexts.couch_area: Couch/seating area — relaxation zone, John often here
scene_contexts.general: Living room / main room with fish tanks, various furniture
